simple_types.name: Oversampling_Ratio
simple_types.code: type Oversampling_Ratio is (OSR_1, OSR_2, OSR_4, OSR_8, OSR_16, OSR_32);

simple_types.name: Reference_Volage
simple_types.code:
type Reference_Volage is (VREFAU,
                          VDDANA,
                          VREFAB,
                          INTREF);

subprograms.name: Configure_Channel

documentation.description:
Stop the device when the CPU is halted by an external debugger.
This mode is enabled by default.
return True if the DAC is enabled
